company.name: Apex Sportswear Industries
company.tagline: Engineered for Performance. Built for the World.
company.description: A leading sportswear manufacturer based in Sialkot, Pakistan, specializing in OEM/ODM custom team uniforms, compression wear, fightwear, and athletic apparel for global brands and clubs. With over 18 years of export experience, we deliver precision-engineered sportswear to 35+ countries across six continents.
company.mission: To empower athletes and teams worldwide with high-performance sportswear that combines cutting-edge technology, superior craftsmanship, and sustainable manufacturing practices.
company.vision: To be the most trusted sportswear manufacturing partner for global brands, known for quality, innovation, and reliability.

history.event: Founded as a small garment workshop in Sialkot
First international export order to Germany

capabilities.description: Vertically integrated manufacturing from fabric sourcing to finished product, with in-house sublimation, embroidery, cut-and-sew, and quality assurance. Our facility houses modern German and Japanese machinery operated by skilled craftsmen with decades of experience.
capabilities.qualityControl: Four-stage AQL 2.5 inspection process with dedicated QC team at every production stage

products.name: Football Kits
products.description: Custom sublimation-printed football uniforms with moisture-wicking polyester. Full kit options include jersey, shorts, and socks. FIFA-compliant materials available for professional leagues.
products.longDescription: Our football kits are engineered for peak performance on the pitch. Using advanced sublimation printing technology, we create vibrant, fade-resistant designs that maintain their quality wash after wash. Each kit features moisture-wicking fabric that keeps players cool and dry, reinforced stitching for durability, and customizable options including team logos, player names, and numbers.

products.name: Cricket Apparel
products.description: Professional cricket uniforms including playing kits, training wear, and team travel gear. UV-protective fabrics with moisture management technology for long-format matches.
products.longDescription: Designed for the rigors of cricket, our apparel combines traditional craftsmanship with modern fabric technology. From Test match whites to colorful T20 kits, we produce uniforms that meet the highest standards of the game. UV-protective fabrics shield players during long days in the field, while moisture management keeps them comfortable.

products.name: Boxing Equipment
products.description: Professional boxing shorts, robes, gloves, and protective gear manufactured to international competition standards. Trusted by promoters and gyms worldwide.
products.longDescription: Our boxing equipment is crafted for fighters who demand the best. From amateur to professional level, our gear meets the standards of major boxing organizations. Hand-stitched satin shorts, padded gloves with genuine leather, and robes with custom embroidery — every piece is built to perform under the brightest lights.

products.name: MMA & Fightwear
products.description: Mixed martial arts shorts, rashguards, and gi uniforms designed for durability and freedom of movement. Competition-ready with reinforced stress points.
products.longDescription: Built for the cage, our MMA fightwear withstands the most intense training and competition. 4-way stretch fabrics allow full range of motion, while reinforced seams survive the toughest grappling sessions. Our rashguards feature anti-microbial treatment, and our shorts have secure waistbands that stay put through every round.

products.name: Running Apparel
products.description: Performance running shirts, shorts, tights, and jackets with reflective details and ergonomic design. Engineered for marathon, trail, and everyday running.
products.longDescription: Every stitch of our running apparel is designed with the runner in mind. Ergonomic paneling follows the body's natural movement, reflective elements ensure visibility in low light, and ventilation zones provide targeted cooling. From 5K to ultramarathon, our gear performs when it matters most.

specs.wash: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low

products.name: Gym & Fitness Wear
products.description: Men's and women's training apparel including tank tops, leggings, shorts, and sports bras. Squat-proof, sweat-wicking fabrics for intense workouts.
products.longDescription: Our gym and fitness collection is designed for athletes who push their limits. Squat-proof opacity ensures confidence during any exercise, compression fit options provide muscle support, and sweat-wicking technology keeps you dry. Every piece is tested in real training environments before reaching production.

specs.wash: Machine wash cold, no fabric softener

products.name: Basketball Uniforms
products.description: Full basketball uniform sets with sublimation printing, mesh construction, and team customization. Jersey and short sets with matching accessories.
products.longDescription: Our basketball uniforms combine style with performance. Mesh construction provides maximum breathability during intense games, while sublimation printing allows unlimited design possibilities. From NBA-style jerseys to custom team sets, we deliver uniforms that look as good as they perform.

products.name: Martial Arts Uniforms
products.description: Karate, taekwondo, judo, and kung fu uniforms with reinforced stitching and competition-grade construction. Approved for international tournaments.
products.longDescription: Our martial arts uniforms honor tradition while embracing modern performance. Reinforced knees and elbows withstand intense training, lightweight fabrics allow fluid movement, and competition-grade construction meets the standards of international federations. Available in traditional and modern cuts.

products.name: Sports Accessories
products.description: Bags, headbands, wristbands, shin guards, socks, and other sportswear accessories. Custom branding available on all items.
products.longDescription: Complete your sportswear line with our accessories collection. From gym bags to headbands, every item can be customized with your brand. We use the same quality standards for accessories as our main product lines, ensuring consistency across your entire range.

products.name: Compression Wear
products.description: Performance compression tights, tops, and sleeves with graduated compression zones. Designed for athletic recovery and enhanced performance.
products.longDescription: Our compression wear uses medical-grade fabrics with graduated compression zones that support muscles during activity and aid recovery afterward. Scientifically designed compression patterns improve blood circulation, reduce muscle fatigue, and enhance proprioception. Trusted by professional athletes worldwide.

certifications.name: ISO 9001:2015
certifications.description: Quality Management System — Consistent quality across all production lines with documented processes and continuous improvement
certifications.benefit: Ensures every product meets international quality standards

certifications.name: ISO 14001:2015
certifications.description: Environmental Management System — Sustainable manufacturing practices with reduced environmental impact
certifications.benefit: Responsible manufacturing that protects the environment

certifications.name: OEKO-TEX Standard 100
certifications.description: Tested for harmful substances — Safe for direct skin contact, certified for baby articles

certifications.name: BSCI
certifications.description: Business Social Compliance Initiative — Ethical labor practices and fair working conditions
certifications.benefit: Ethically manufactured products your customers can trust

certifications.name: SEDEX/SMETA
certifications.description: Ethical trade audit compliant — Transparent supply chain with verified social responsibility
certifications.benefit: Full supply chain transparency and accountability

certifications.name: CE Marking
certifications.description: European Conformity for protective sportswear — Meets EU safety, health, and environmental requirements
certifications.benefit: Ready for European markets without additional certification

certifications.name: FIFA Quality
certifications.description: Approved football supplier — Products meet FIFA's strict quality and performance standards
certifications.benefit: Official quality approval for football products

certifications.name: WRAP
certifications.description: Worldwide Responsible Accredited Production — Global manufacturing standards for ethical production

materials.name: Polyester
materials.description: Lightweight, durable, and moisture-wicking. The most popular fabric for sportswear.

materials.name: Nylon/Spandex
materials.description: Stretchy and supportive with excellent shape retention. Ideal for compression wear.

materials.name: Cotton/Polyester Blend
materials.description: Comfort of cotton with durability of polyester. Perfect for martial arts uniforms.

materials.name: Mesh Polyester
materials.description: Maximum breathability with lightweight construction. Essential for high-intensity sports.

whyChooseUs.title: 18+ Years Experience
whyChooseUs.description: Nearly two decades of manufacturing expertise for global sportswear brands

whyChooseUs.title: Low MOQ from 50 Pieces
whyChooseUs.description: Flexible minimum orders that grow with your business — no excessive inventory

whyChooseUs.title: Fast Sampling
whyChooseUs.description: 3-5 day sampling with detailed tech packs before full production begins

whyChooseUs.title: Full OEM/ODM
whyChooseUs.description: From your designs to our designs — complete manufacturing flexibility

whyChooseUs.title: Export Expertise
whyChooseUs.description: GSP+ duty advantage into EU, DDP shipping to 35+ countries

whyChooseUs.title: Quality Guaranteed
whyChooseUs.description: Four-stage AQL 2.5 inspection with dedicated QC at every step

faq.question: What is your minimum order quantity?
faq.answer: Our MOQ is 50 pieces per style/color for most products. This allows small brands to start with manageable orders and scale up as they grow.

faq.question: How long does production take?
faq.answer: Standard production is 2-4 weeks after sample approval. Rush orders can be accommodated with expedited timelines.

faq.question: Do you offer sampling?
faq.answer: Yes, we provide pre-production samples in 3-5 days. Sample cost is refunded on orders of 500+ pieces.

faq.question: What certifications do you have?
faq.answer: We hold ISO 9001, ISO 14001, OEKO-TEX 100, BSCI, SEDEX, CE Marking, FIFA Quality, and WRAP certifications.

faq.question: Can you handle custom designs?
faq.answer: Absolutely. We offer full OEM/ODM services with tech pack development, sampling, and unlimited design customization.

faq.question: What are your payment terms?
faq.answer: We accept T/T (bank transfer), L/C (Letter of Credit), Western Union, and PayPal for sample orders.

faq.question: Do you ship internationally?
faq.answer: Yes, we export to 35+ countries with FOB, CIF, EXW, and DDP shipping terms available.

faq.question: What is GSP+ and how does it benefit me?
faq.answer: Pakistan's GSP+ status allows 0% import duty into all 27 EU member states, giving you a ~12% cost advantage over non-GSP origins.

specialConditions: GSP+ 0% import duty into all 27 EU member states
Pakistan Origin Certificate for preferential tariffs
Door-to-door DDP shipping to USA, UK, EU, Australia, Canada

testimonials.quote: Outstanding quality and communication. Our custom team kits arrived on time and exceeded expectations. Apex is a reliable long-term partner.
testimonials.author: Marcus Weber

testimonials.quote: We have been sourcing boxing equipment from Apex for 5 years. Consistent quality, competitive pricing, and they understand our market.
testimonials.author: James Mitchell

testimonials.quote: The sublimation printing quality is world-class. Our fitness brand's custom leggings are bestsellers, thanks to Apex's manufacturing.
testimonials.author: Sarah Al-Hassan

testimonials.quote: Apex delivered our entire martial arts uniform line in just 3 weeks. The quality and attention to detail is unmatched.
testimonials.author: Takeshi Yamamoto

testimonials.quote: From tech pack to finished product, the process was seamless. Our academy kits look professional and perform brilliantly.
testimonials.author: Carlos Rodriguez

contact.responseTime: We respond to all inquiries within 24 hours
